description:
Start your career or business in Government Contracting: https://www.govclose.com/govclose-certification-program

Most veterans don't consider government contracting post-military. However, public sector careers and entrepreneur opportunities are perfectly matched with the experience you gain in the military.

Whether you're retiring from the military, transitioning out, or serving the National Guard or Reserves, federal contracting should be something that you consider. 

Learn more about government contracting: https://www.govclose.com
fulltitle: Government Contract Careers for Veterans in 2026
